personal.name: Nagesh Bellary
personal.title: Technical Product Manager | AIoT · Connected Vehicles · SDV
personal.summary: Technical Product Manager with 5+ years owning AI-driven, IoT-enabled connected-vehicle products at Daimler Truck, backed by 9+ years in cloud architecture and software engineering. Proven record in product discovery, roadmap definition, backlog prioritization, and data-driven decision-making — delivering platforms spanning telematics, payments, and intelligent connected ecosystems with 95%+ on-time releases across cross-functional teams of 10–25+. Certified PSPO I; PMP in progress.

experience.title: Technical Product Manager
experience.description: Own product vision, strategy, and roadmap for AI-driven, IoT-enabled, and decentralized connected-vehicle products, balancing customer needs, business goals, and technical feasibility.
achievements: Lead product discovery workshops with customers, business stakeholders, and architects; translate insights into PRDs, epics, and prioritized backlogs using data-driven frameworks
Delivered end-to-end integrations across telematics platforms, payment gateways, and fuel-station networks, achieving 95%+ on-time milestone delivery with teams of 10-25+ members
Partner with AI/ML teams to ship predictive analytics, intelligent automation, and GenAI / LLM-based capabilities into customer-facing product experiences
Improved delivery predictability by 30% through structured Agile governance and release planning
Reduced rework by ~20% by improving requirement clarity across global business and engineering stakeholders
Mitigated schedule slippages by ~25% through proactive risk tracking, dependency management, and escalation frameworks
Mentor product owners and engineers, driving a culture of AI adoption, experimentation, and continuous learning

experience.title: Technical Architect
experience.description: Shaped and delivered Azure cloud and data-engineering solutions powering business analytics and data-driven decision platforms.
achievements: Partnered with business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable solution architectures, defining scope, priorities, and implementation roadmaps
Established architecture standards and governance for scalability, performance, security, and reliability across cross-functional teams
Drove cloud modernization, automation, and DevOps initiatives, accelerating product delivery and improving system reliability

experience.title: Software Engineer — QA & Test Automation Lead
experience.description: Led test automation and quality engineering across enterprise releases.
achievements: Built Java / Selenium frameworks integrated with CI/CD, improving test efficiency and release velocity
Partnered with product owners and developers to validate requirements, define quality objectives, and ensure release readiness
Ran defect triage, testing schedules, and stakeholder quality reporting; mentored QA engineers across development and testing teams

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Designed and built scalable backend applications, RESTful APIs, and microservices in Java and Python for distributed web and mobile platforms.
achievements: Optimized relational and NoSQL databases and integrated third-party APIs and messaging systems for business-critical workflows

certifications.name: Professional Scrum Product Owner I (PSPO I)
Advanced Certification in Software Engineering for Cloud, Blockchain and IoT

projects.name: Personal AI Recruiter Bot
projects.description: This bot — an AI-powered personal recruiter chatbot using a RAG architecture with Ollama for 100% local LLM inference. Recruiters interact with an AI that answers questions about Nagesh's profile via semantic retrieval, grounded in his real resume and profile data. Full C4 architecture documentation, FastAPI backend, React frontend.
projects.impact: AI portfolio showcase demonstrating RAG architecture, full-stack engineering, and production-grade system design

projects.name: Multi-Agent Product Council
projects.description: A simulated AI leadership council — six personas (Product Strategist, Engineering Lead, UX Lead, Data & Analytics Lead, Customer Voice, Security & Compliance) debate a product proposal across independent and cross-examination rounds, then a Moderator synthesizes a decision. Grounded in real project context via a persistent, uploadable knowledge base.
projects.impact: Demonstrates multi-agent orchestration and RAG-grounded decision support, built hand-rolled rather than on top of an agent framework

projects.name: Product Owner Brainer
projects.description: AI-assisted decision support tool for Product Owners, built with the help of an AI coding assistant to explore agentic workflows for sprint planning, backlog prioritization, and stakeholder communication.
projects.impact: Part of a portfolio of AI showcase projects exploring practical GenAI product patterns

achievements: Improved delivery predictability by 30% through structured Agile governance and release planning at Daimler Truck
Achieved 95%+ on-time milestone delivery across cross-functional teams of 10-25+ members
Reduced requirement-related rework by ~20% across global business and engineering stakeholders
Mitigated schedule slippages by ~25% through proactive risk tracking and dependency management
Advanced Certification in Software Engineering for Cloud, Blockchain and IoT from IIT Madras (2024)
availability: Open to Technical Product Manager and AI-focused product leadership roles, particularly in connected vehicles, IoT, and GenAI product spaces.
